residential_masonry.label: Residential – Masonry
residential_masonry.description: Brick or block residential building. Common in UK/EU. Higher flood resistance than wood, lower than concrete.

residential_wood.label: Residential – Wood Frame
residential_wood.description: Light wood-frame single-family home. High wildfire vulnerability; common in North America and Oceania.

residential_concrete.label: Residential – Concrete
residential_concrete.description: Concrete block or reinforced concrete home. Common in Mediterranean, Middle East, South Asia.

residential_high_rise.label: Residential – High-Rise Apartment
residential_high_rise.description: Multi-storey apartment block (10+ floors). Concrete frame. Ground-floor flood exposure; significant wind and heat load. Common in Asia and urban Europe.

commercial_steel.label: Commercial – Steel Frame
commercial_steel.description: Mid-rise steel-frame office or retail building. Flat roof increases wind load. Common in city centres.

commercial_concrete.label: Commercial – Concrete Tower
commercial_concrete.description: Reinforced concrete commercial or mixed-use tower. Robust structure; main risk is flood (lower floors) and heat (HVAC load).

commercial_office.label: Commercial – Office Building
commercial_office.description: Modern office tower (steel or composite frame). Heat is the primary operational risk; flood affects lower floors and mechanical plant.

commercial_retail.label: Commercial – Retail / Shopping Centre
commercial_retail.description: Single- or multi-level retail unit or shopping centre. Large flat roof; significant flood exposure at ground level.

commercial_warehouse.label: Commercial – Logistics / Warehouse
commercial_warehouse.description: Large-span distribution or logistics warehouse. Light steel portal frame; high wind and flood exposure due to large footprint and shallow eaves.

industrial_steel.label: Industrial – Light Steel / Factory
industrial_steel.description: Light steel industrial shed, factory, or workshop. Vulnerable to wind uplift; significant flood exposure.

industrial_heavy.label: Industrial – Heavy / Chemical / Refinery
industrial_heavy.description: Heavy industrial process plant, chemical works, or refinery. Robust structure but highly sensitive to flood contamination and water stress (process cooling dependency).

healthcare_hospital.label: Healthcare – Hospital / Medical Centre
healthcare_hospital.description: Hospital or large medical facility. Critical infrastructure: all hazards apply. Essential services on lower floors have high flood sensitivity.

education_school.label: Education – School / University
education_school.description: School, college, or university building. Masonry or concrete; large roof. Heat impacts occupant productivity significantly.

data_center.label: Data Centre / Server Facility
data_center.description: Mission-critical data centre. Extremely sensitive to heat (cooling systems), flood (raised floor), and water availability (cooling towers).

hotel_resort.label: Hotel / Resort
hotel_resort.description: Hotel or resort building. Coastal resorts face elevated wind and storm surge risk; heat affects guest comfort and HVAC demand.

agricultural.label: Agricultural Building
agricultural.description: Farm buildings, barns, grain stores. Lightweight construction; high wind and flood vulnerability.

infrastructure_road.label: Road / Highway Infrastructure
infrastructure_road.description: Roads, highways, and paved surfaces. Flood undermining and wildfire closures are primary risks.

infrastructure_bridge.label: Bridge / Overpass
infrastructure_bridge.description: Road or rail bridge. Scour (flood undermining of foundations) and extreme wind on deck are primary risks.

infrastructure_utility.label: Utility Infrastructure (Substation / Pump)
infrastructure_utility.description: Electrical substations, pumping stations, telecom towers. Flood and heat are critical; wildfire can sever power lines.

infrastructure_port.label: Port / Marine Infrastructure
infrastructure_port.description: Port terminals, jetties, quay walls. Storm surge and extreme wind are primary risks; low-lying elevation is a key risk driver.

mixed_use.label: Mixed-Use Development
mixed_use.description: Combined residential, retail, and office building. Concrete or steel-composite frame. All urban hazards apply.
